_meta.purpose: Body-fluid analysis interpretation (CSF, pleural/ascitic, synovial) for the rules engine + LLM, including Light's criteria and CSF patterns. Decision support only; culture/cytology confirm.
_meta.source: Standard body-fluid analysis references + Light's criteria + SAAG. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

opening_pressure.name: CSF opening pressure
opening_pressure.note: High -> meningitis, SAH, raised ICP, IIH.

wcc.name: CSF white cell count
wcc.note: Neutrophil predominance -> bacterial; lymphocytic -> viral/TB/fungal. >5 abnormal (adult).

protein.name: CSF protein
protein.note: High -> infection, inflammation, Guillain-Barré (albuminocytologic dissociation), block.

bacterial.csf: cloudy, neutrophils high, protein high, glucose LOW
bacterial.note: EMERGENCY: Gram stain + culture + start empirical antibiotics immediately.

viral.csf: clear, lymphocytes, protein normal/mild, glucose normal

tb_fungal.note: India ink/CrAg for Cryptococcus; ZN/GeneXpert for TB.

wcc.name: Synovial WCC
wcc.note: <200 normal; 200-2000 non-inflammatory; 2000-50000 inflammatory; >50000 with neutrophils -> SEPTIC ARTHRITIS.

crystals.name: Synovial crystals (polarised)
crystals.note: Negatively birefringent needles -> gout (urate); positively birefringent rhomboids -> pseudogout (CPPD).
